## Summary

Describe the idea clearly and briefly.

## Motivation

Why should this be added or changed?

## Proposed direction

Describe the expected behavior or design direction.

## Security / operational impact

Does this affect security boundaries, HTTPS/TLS behavior, WebUI/API permissions, or container runtime behavior?

## Additional context

Anything else that helps evaluate the request.
